title: hibbertia davisii
intro: Hibbertia davisii, also known as the Guinea flower, is a small, yellow-flowering shrub native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hibbertia davisii include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Hibbertia davisii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to support overall health and well-being.
